news.headline: Life Time reveals prize purses for 2025 races: UNBOUND Gravel 200, Leadville Trail 100 MTB, Big Sugar Gravel. New Grand Prix format with best-five-of-six races.
news.summary: Life Time, a leading healthy lifestyle brand and athletic event producer, recently revealed the prize purse and scoring system for the 2025 Grand Prix under the new best-five-of-six format. The announcement was made on October 17, 2024, in Chanassen, Minnesota. The event will feature a total prize amount of $X and will use a scoring system designed to ensure fair competition. Life Time's stock is listed on NYSE under the symbol LTH. The Grand Prix is set to be a must-watch event for sports enthusiasts.

news.headline: Record $1.5B settlement reached between Mary Alexander & Associates and L.A. Catholic Church over sex abuse claims.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on October 17, 2024, a record-breaking settlement was revealed by Mary Alexander & Associates involving sex abuse claims against the Archdiocese of Los Angeles. The settlement amount has surged past $1.5 billion. Over the course of many years, Mary Alexander has been the legal representation for numerous victims in this historic case of litigation.

news.headline: Market update: USD Index 102.915, oil $70.88/bbl (-3.74%), copper $4.35/lb (-1.11%), gold +0.27%, silver +0.43%. DJIA ATH at 43,139.
news.summary: Michael Ballanger discusses the current market state, focusing on oil, copper, gold, and silver prices. The USD Index futures are down 0.167% at 102.915, with 10-yr. yield at 4.068% and 30-yr. yield at 4.37%. Gold is up 0.27%, silver up 0.43%, copper down 1.11% to $4.35/lb, and oil sharply lower at $70.88/bbl. DJIA futures and S&P 500 futures are up while NASDAQ futures rise by 0.04%. Bitcoin is up by 1.08%, trading at $65,704. The market is at or near all-time highs with DJIA hitting 43,139, S&P 500 at ATH, and NASDAQ close to reaching ATH. The Russell 2000 is also close to its ATH. Despite historically weak months approaching, market anomalies persist. Algo-bots now control over 70% of the market.

news.headline: States face significant impact of proposed import taxes by Trump, particularly affecting economy and jobs.
Venmo users in the U.S. can now purchase Bitcoin and Ethereum through MoonPay, announced on Thursday.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, it was revealed that U.S. customers are now able to use PayPal's Venmo to add funds and conduct cryptocurrency transactions through MoonPay. This development signifies an expansion in Venmo's services, allowing users to engage in crypto purchases.

news.headline: IDACORP, Inc. (NYSE: IDA) declares a $0.86 per share dividend, payable on December 2, 2024 to holders of record on November 5, 2024.
news.summary: IDACORP, Inc. (NYSE:IDA) based in Boise, Idaho, announced a common stock dividend of $0.86 per share. This dividend will be payable on December 2, 2024, to shareholders of record as of November 5, 2024.

news.headline: Lear Capital predicts long growth ahead for silver due to its key role in renewable energy and industry.
news.summary: The significant utility of silver in renewable energy and various industries is shaping market dynamics. On October 17, 2024, in Los Angeles, Lear Capital, a prominent player in the precious metals sector for more than 27 years, unveiled a comprehensive analysis on the silver market. This report sheds light on the latest trends regarding silver's role in key sectors, highlighting its importance.

news.headline: Con Edison declares a quarterly dividend of 83 cents per share on its common stock, payable on December 16, 2024.Summary: Con Edison's stock dividend of 83 cents/share payable on Dec 16, 2024.

(Con Edison) (NYSE: ED) revealed its decision to issue a quarterly dividend of 83 cents per share on its common stock. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on December 16, 2024, to shareholders of record as of November 13, 2024. Con Edison, Inc., a prominent company in the United States..."

news.headline: Docebo Inc. will hold a conference call on Nov 8, 2024, to discuss Q3 fiscal year 2024 results. CEO and CFO will host the session.
news.summary: In Toronto, Docebo Inc. (Nasdaq: DCBO; TSX: DCBO) revealed its plans to host a conference call on November 8, 2024, at 8:00 a.m. (ET) to review the company's third-quarter financial results for fiscal year 2024. The discussion will feature Alessio Artuffo, the President and Chief Executive Officer, along with Sukaran Mehta, the Chief Financial Officer. Docebo is a prominent learning platform provider known for its expertise in artificial intelligence and commitment to innovation.

news.headline: CodexIT, a healthcare tech solutions leader, acquires professional services company, enhancing patient-centric services.
news.summary: COLUMBUS, Ohio - On October 17, 2024, CodexIT, a prominent provider of healthcare technology solutions, managed services, clinical consulting, and analytics, revealed its recent acquisition. The company continues to bolster its patient-focused technology assistance and service capabilities. This move further solidifies CodexIT's position as a national leader in the sector, reinforcing its commitment to innovation and client support. The acquisition marks a significant development for the company as it advances its offerings to meet the evolving needs of the healthcare industry.

news.headline: RDP gives $15 million NMTC financing to ERMCO for Dyersburg expansion, equipping. Partners to improve infrastructure.
news.summary: In Forest City, Iowa, on October 17, 2024, Rural Development Partners (RDP) announced the approval of $15 million in New Markets Tax Credit (NMTC) funding for Electric Research Manufacturing Cooperative, Inc. (ERMCO) located in Dyersburg, Tennessee. This financial boost will support ERMCO's expansion and equipment needs.

news.headline: Vizsla Silver Corp completes acquisition of La Garra-Metates district, securing potential for future growth.
news.summary: Vizsla Silver Corp., a company traded on the TSX Venture Exchange (TSXV: VZLA), the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: VZLA), and the Frankfurt Stock Exchange (Frankfurt: 0G3), has successfully finalized its purchase of the La Garra-Metates district. The Acquisition marks a significant milestone for the company as it looks to expand its operations. The district, which has a rich mining history, presents attractive opportunities for Vizsla Silver. This move aligns with the company's strategic growth objectives and reinforces its position in the mining sector.

news.headline: Netflix surpasses projections despite strike effects, outperforming expectations.
Peloton to announce Q1 fiscal 2025 results on Oct. 31, 2024, with conference call at 8:30 am EST. #PelotonInteractive #Earnings.release
news.summary: Peloton Interactive, Inc. (NASDAQ: PTON) is set to unveil its Q1 fiscal 2025 results on October 31, 2024, prior to the opening of the U.S. stock market. An earnings call and live audio webcast to review the results will be held at 8:30 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day.

news.headline: National Kidney Foundation invests in Revalia Bio for kidney disease therapeutics, leading to innovative care advancements.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, the National Kidney Foundation (NKF) Innovation Fund revealed its recent investment in Revalia Bio, a pioneering health technology firm that prioritizes revolutionizing the approach to developing and providing personalized care for kidney-related issues.

news.headline: Robinhood's acquisition of Bitstamp will boost crypto growth, offering more options like Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Dogecoin.
news.summary: Robinhood Markets (NASDAQ: HOOD) is expanding its offerings for retail traders, including crypto options, following the acquisition of Bitstamp. At the 2024 HOOD Summit in Miami, Robinhood Crypto General Manager Johann Kerbrat discussed the platform's wide range of products, from stocks and options to cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH), and Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE). Users of Robinhood Crypto can independently manage and secure their assets in wallets. Kerbrat emphasized the importance of beginner investors starting with small trades to gain knowledge about assets before diving into the market, emphasizing the role of education in investing. Additionally, Robinhood announced growth opportunities with the recent acquisition of Bitstamp. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Seabourn Pursuit found remains of WW1 ship Titania, sank in 1914 near Chile. First sighting in 110 years.
news.summary: A state-of-the-art luxury expedition vessel made an extraordinary discovery during a recent submarine dive. The Titania, a German ship from World War I, was found, making it the first sighting of the vessel in over a century. The exploration took place off the coast of Seattle, and images and a video of the discovery can be accessed through provided links. This discovery has stirred significant interest in maritime history and has captured the attention of many, shedding new light on an important historical artifact.

news.headline: Top-tasting pumpkin beers for the season, according to Bloomberg.
Viavi Solutions Inc. will announce fiscal Q1 2025 results on Oct 31, 2024, after market close.
news.summary: Viavi Solutions Inc., a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol VIAV, is set to release its financial results for the fiscal first quarter of 2025 which ended on September 28, 2024. The announcement is scheduled for Thursday, October 31, 2024, after the market closes. This will provide insights into the company's performance during this period and will be followed by an earnings briefing. Stay tuned for more information.

news.headline: Janus International Group (NYSE: JBI) to report Q3 2024 results on October 29th before market opens. Webcast and call at 10am ET.
news.summary: Temple, Georgia - Janus International Group, Inc. (NYSE: JBI), a prominent global supplier of advanced access control technologies and building products for the self-storage and other commercial sectors, disclosed plans to unveil its financial outcomes for the third quarter of 2024 prior to market opening on Tuesday, October 29, 2024. A webcast and conference call are scheduled for the same day at 10:00 a.m. ET to discuss the Company's performance.

news.headline: Better Home & Finance Holding to reveal Q3 2024 results on Nov. 13, 2024. Conference call scheduled for 8:30 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Better Home & Finance Holding Company, listed on NASDAQ as BETR and BETRW, plans to reveal its Q3 2024 financial results on Wednesday, November 13, 2024, before the market opens. On that day, at 8:30 a.m. ET, a conference call and webcast will be conducted to review the results. Information on registering for the live webcast and accessing the call via phone will be provided on the Company's investor relations webpage.

news.headline: Key figure in Chanel growth, Arie Kopelman, passes away at 86. Led revenue growth and product expansion as president.
news.summary: Two years after Karl Lagerfeld, he joined the renowned luxury house as its president and played a key role in overseeing a significant increase in both product offerings and profits.

news.headline: Little Sunshine's Playhouse & Preschool is opening a 7th location in Castle Rock, CO, expanding their reach in the Denver metro area.
news.summary: A new Little Sunshine's Playhouse & Preschool location is set to open in Castle Rock, Colorado, signaling a significant milestone for the company. The expansion into this area demonstrates the organization's commitment to providing high-quality early childhood education. The new facility is expected to offer a range of services for children in the Castle Rock community, including preschool programs and childcare. This development follows the company's successful track record in the industry and reflects its dedication to serving young learners.

news.headline: ALICORN partners with Curai Health to offer text-based care 24/7 to members in all 50 states.
news.summary: ALICORN Inc., a prominent provider of health and productivity services to employers and businesses, has unveiled a new collaboration with Curai Health to offer text-based care around the clock in every state across the U.S. Through this partnership, ALICORN members will gain access to 24/7 chat-based virtual healthcare services. The alliance between ALICORN and Curai Health signifies a significant step towards enhancing healthcare accessibility, with individuals being able to seek medical support and advice through text messaging at any time, regardless of their location within the country.

news.headline: Bandwidth Inc. (NASDAQ: BAND) will report Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 31, 2024.
news.summary: Raleigh, North Carolina - Bandwidth Inc., an influential enterprise cloud communications firm, disclosed it will release its third-quarter financial figures for the period ending September 30, 2024, before the market opens on October 31, 2024. The report will provide insights into the company's performance in the mentioned period.

news.headline: Sunber Hair marks 7th anniversary with exceptional sale; discounts akin to Black Friday on Oct 18. Trusted wig brand.
news.summary: Sunber Hair is currently celebrating its 7th anniversary with a major sale offering discounts comparable to Black Friday prices starting on October 18th. This New York-based wig brand has gained significant popularity in the past 6 years, becoming a top choice for many women.

news.headline: Centrus Energy's subsidiary wins U.S. Department of Energy award for HALEU enrichment, promoting domestic production.
news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland on October 17, 2024, Centrus Energy shared that its subsidiary, American Centrifuge Operating, LLC ("ACO"), was granted an award from the U.S. Department of Energy. This award is designated to further the domestic commercial production of High-Assay low enriched uranium (LEU). Centrus Energy is listed on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol LEU.

news.headline: Genpact Limited declares dividend of $0.1525 per common share for Q4 2024.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Genpact Limited (NYSE: G), a worldwide professional services and solutions company, revealed that its board of directors has approved a cash dividend of $0.1525 per common share for the fourth quarter.

news.summary: Today, Sealed Air (NYSE: SEE) based in Charlotte, North Carolina, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per common share. The dividend will be paid on December 20, 2024, to shareholders of record as of the end of business on December...

news.headline: Huntington Bancshares Inc. declares quarterly dividend of $0.155 per common share.
news.summary: A company based in Columbus, Ohio, Huntington Bancshares Incorporated, recently revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend for its common stock (Nasdaq: HBAN) at $0.155 per common share. This amount remains the same as the previous quarter.

news.headline: Ansys (NASDAQ: ANSS) to release Q3 2024 earnings on Nov 6 after market close in light of pending Synopsys, Inc. transaction.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on October 17, 2024, ANSYS, Inc. (NASDAQ: ANSS) revealed plans to disclose its third quarter financial results on Wednesday, November 6, 2024, post-market closing. This update comes amidst the ongoing transaction discussions with Synopsys, Inc.

news.headline: Lincoln Electric raises dividend by 5.6%, now at $0.75 per share quarterly ($3.00 annually). Payable Jan 15, 2025.
news.summary: Cleveland-based Lincoln Electric Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: LECO) recently approved a 5.6% rise in their quarterly cash dividend to $0.75 per share, amounting to $3.00 annually. This increase comes as a result of robust cash flow and successful implementation of their Higher Standard 2025 Strategy. The dividend will be paid on January 15, 2025, to shareholders on record as of December 31, 2024. This move showcases the company's confidence in its financial performance and commitment to rewarding shareholders.

news.headline: McCormick & Company will hold Investor Day on Oct 22, 2024 at Global HQ in Hunt Valley, MD, led by CEO Brendan Foley.
news.summary: In Hunt Valley, Maryland, on October 17, 2024, McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE: MKC), a renowned flavor leader, will hold an Investor Day on October 22, 2024, at its Global Headquarters. Brendan Foley, President and CEO, will be present at the event.

news.headline: SolarWinds (NYSE: SWI) to disclose Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 31 with an earnings call at 7:30am CT.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, SolarWinds Corporation (NYSE: SWI), a prominent provider of observability and IT management software, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for Q3 of 2024 on October 31, 2024. The company will conduct an earnings call at 7:30 a.m. CT on the same day to discuss the results. The call will also be available via live webcast to investors and the general public.

news.headline: Regency Affiliates bought back 331,500 shares in a private transaction on Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: LARCHMONT, New York - Regency Affiliates, Inc. disclosed today that on October 17, 2024, it completed the acquisition of 331,500 shares of its common stock from a non-affiliated shareholder in a privately negotiated deal. The transaction, which took place on the OTC Pink market under the ticker symbol RAFI, marks a significant investment in the company's outstanding shares. This move underscores Regency's strategic efforts to bolster its stock portfolio and enhance shareholder value.

news.headline: Natalia Scherbakoff named CTO of Orion S.A., succeeding David Deters after his decade leading global innovation program.
news.summary: In Houston today, Orion S.A. (NYSE: OEC), a leading global specialty chemicals producer, revealed the appointment of Natalia Scherbakoff as their new Chief Technology Officer. She will step into the position previously held by David Deters, who oversaw a successful global innovation initiative for almost ten years, positioning Orion as a pioneer in sustainable materials, battery additives, and other technological advancements in the carbon black sector. Deters, who announced his retirement earlier this year, will continue working with Orion for a transition period.

news.headline: Richmond American Homes opens new community, Timberline, in Meridian, Idaho on Oct. 17, 2024. Energy-efficient homes with designer details.
news.summary: Richmond American Homes of Idaho, Inc., a subsidiary of M.D.C. Holdings, Inc., has announced the Grand Opening of Timberline, a new community offering energy-efficient homes with modern designer details and open layouts in Meridian, Idaho. The Grand Opening event took place on October 17, 2024. This development signifies the company's commitment to providing innovative and stylish housing options for potential home buyers looking for sustainable and well-designed properties.

news.headline: Semrush Holdings, Inc. will review Q3 2024 financial results in conference call on Nov 8, 2024 at 8:30 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Semrush Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: SEMR), a prominent online visibility management SaaS platform, is set to announce its financial results for the third quarter ending on September 30, 2024. The report will be disclosed after the US market closes on Thursday, November 7, 2024. A conference call discussing these results will be hosted on Friday, November 8, 2024 at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time, with Oleg Shchegolev, CEO, and Euge leading the discussion. Key information for the conference call is as follows: Date - Friday, November 8, 2024; Time - 8:30 a.m. ET.

news.headline: Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ:ISRG) beats Q3 estimates with $2.04B revenue, $1.84 EPS. Da Vinci procedures climb 18%, 379 systems placed.
news.summary: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. disclosed its Q3 financial results post-market on Thursday. The company surpassed expectations with a Q3 revenue of $2.04 billion, exceeding the projected $2 billion. Adjusted earnings stood at $1.84 per share, beating the anticipated $1.63 per share. This marks a 17% revenue increase year-over-year. Worldwide da Vinci procedures rose by about 18% compared to the previous year. In the quarter, Intuitive Surgical deployed 379 da Vinci surgical systems, up from 312 in the previous period.

news.headline: United Bancshares, Inc. reports $0.83 EPS in Q3, $2.5 million net income. $154.4 million deposit growth. $13.4 million loan growth. Dividend of $0.22 per share announced.
news.summary: United Bancshares, Inc. has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.22 per share, with a 4.50% dividend yield based on third-quarter closing prices. Their net income for Q3 2024 was $2.5 million, up from $2.0 million in Q3 2023, and YTD 2024 net income was $6.1 million. Return on average assets for Q3 2024 was 0.83%, up from 0.73% in Q3 2023. Loan growth was $13.4 million, and deposit growth was $154.4 million. The company also reported strong asset quality and stable loan metrics. The President & CEO, Brian D. Young, expressed gratitude for the support and trust in the company. Total Assets as of September 30, 2024, were $1.23 billion, with Deposits at $1.11 billion.

news.headline: BlackSky (NYSE: BKSY) to discuss Q3 2024 financial results and business outlook on Nov 7, 2024, in Herndon, VA.
news.summary: Herndon, Virginia-based BlackSky Technology Inc. (NYSE: BKSY) has announced it will conduct a conference call on Thursday, November 7, 2024, at 8:30 a.m. EST to discuss its third quarter financial results and business outlook. Prior to the call, an official press release containing the financial results will be issued. Both the live webcast and archived version post-call can be accessed through the company’s investor relations webpage or by visiting their specified link.

news.headline: Profound Medical will release Q3 2024 results on Nov 7, 2024, after-market close; Conference call to follow.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Profound Medical Corp. (NASDAQ: PROF; TSX: PRN) announced that they will be releasing their financial results for the third quarter of 2024 after the market closes on Thursday, November 7, 2024. Profound is a company specializing in customizable, non-invasive therapies for tissue ablation. The eagerly awaited report will provide insights into the company's performance during a key period, with investors and stakeholders looking forward to key figures and developments. Stay tuned for the latest updates on Profound's financial status and market impact.

news.headline: F.N.B. Corporation reported Q3 2024 net income of $110.1M, deposit growth of $1.8B (5%), and Tangible Book Value per Share grew by 15% to $10.33. Loan and lease growth were $1.6B, while total deposits increased by $2.2B (6.2%). These metrics impacted interest income and net interest margin. Non-interest income was at a record $89.7M. Non-interest expenses increased to $249.4M. Key ratios included Common Equity Tier 1 at 10.4% and Tangible Book Value per Common Share at $10.33. Earnings per common share were $0.30, significantly lower than $0.40 reported in Q3 2023. Net income for the Q3 2024 decreased to $110.1M from $143.3M in Q3 2023. Revenue growth was 9% annually.
news.summary: F.N.B. Corporation reported earnings for the third quarter of 2024 with net income available to common stockholders of $110.1 million or $0.30 per diluted common share, compared to $143.3 million or $0.40 per diluted common share in the third quarter of 2023. Deposit growth was $1.8 billion, or 5%, with period-end total loans and leases increasing by $1.6 billion, or 4.9%. Total period-end deposits increased by $2.2 billion, or 6.2%. Net interest income increased to $323.3 million, and non-interest income totaled $89.7 million. Non-interest expenses were $249.4 million. The provision for credit losses was $23.4 million. The CET1 regulatory capital ratio was 10.4%, and tangible book value per common share was $10.33. The webcast revealed the Company's market coverage across major metropolitan areas and total assets of $48 billion with 350 banking offices. Further details can be found on their corporate website or SEC's website. The Company's financial results conference call was hosted by their executives on October 18, 2024.

news.headline: Malibu Boats, Inc. will release Q1 fiscal 2025 results on Oct. 31, 2024, and host a conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time.
news.summary: In Loudon, Tennessee, on October 17, 2024, Malibu Boats, Inc. (Nasdaq: MBUU) disclosed plans to unveil its first quarter fiscal 2025 financial results on Thursday, October 31, 2024, before the market opens. The company's management will conduct a conference call regarding the results at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day.

news.headline: Netflix's Q3 revenue $9.825B, EPS $5.40, added 5.07M subscribers. Strong growth projected for Q4 due to 'Squid Game' popularity.
news.summary: Netflix Inc, the streaming giant, released their third-quarter financial results with revenue reaching $9.825 billion, marking a 15% increase from the previous year and surpassing the estimated $9.769 billion. Earnings per share were reported at $5.40, exceeding the consensus of $5.12. The company's global paid subscribers totaled 282.72 million, growing by 14.4% annually, with an addition of 5.07 million in the quarter, a decrease from the previous year's 8.8 million. Netflix noted steady member revenue and a 16% rise in revenue in the UCAN region, EMEA region, and 9% in LATAM. Despite these numbers, user engagement remained high in the third quarter.

news.headline: MasterCraft Boat Co. hosts dealer meeting at Tennessee factory. Nearly 170 attendees, unveiled new product.
news.summary: In Vonore, Tennessee on October 17, 2024, MasterCraft Boat Company, a subsidiary of MasterCraft Boat Holdings, Inc (NASDAQ: MCFT) and the top-selling towboat brand globally, held a dealer meeting at its advanced factory. The event brought together around 170 attendees from its dealer network for a day emphasizing education, celebration, and future plans. The structured program included various stations covering product details, company background, pricing approaches, product advancements, marketing trends, and a thorough factory tour. The highlight was the introduction of a new product, indicating the beginning of a fresh and innovative direction for the brand.

news.headline: Tenaya Therapeutics expands TN-201 gene therapy program for MYBPC3-associated HCM; Independent Board supports dose escalation and broader eligibility criteria, cohort 2 enrolling.
news.summary: A recent development in a medical study has been announced where an Independent Data Safety and Monitoring Board has approved the increase in dosage and expansion of eligibility criteria. This decision allows for the enrollment of new participants in the second cohort of the study. The endorsement comes after a review of the data and is seen as a positive step in advancing the research. Interested individuals who meet the updated criteria can now apply to be part of the ongoing study.

news.headline: AYR Wellness to discuss Q3 results on Nov 13 at 8:30 a.m. ET - CSE: AYR.A, OTCQX: AYRWF - Report covers Sept 30, 2024.
news.summary: In Miami on October 17, 2024, AYR Wellness Inc. (CSE: AYR.A, OTCQX: AYRWF), a top U.S. multi-state cannabis operator, will host a conference call on November 13, 2024, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The call aims to review the third-quarter outcomes ending on September 30, 2024.

news.headline: Fed discount-window loans $1.88b in week ended October 16 after $1.75b.
Fed bank term funding loans $66.8b in week ended October 16 after $68.9b.
